_readme: Provisional recipe (look not user-approved). starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC.

notes.sep_engine: net pinned, not the mask+inpaint fallback: this frame holds a resolved galaxy, and inpaint (which keys on compactness + prominence, with no notion of a galaxy) classifies the galaxy's HII knots as stars -- inpainting them out of the starless and screening them back as hard blobs. net keeps the field-star flux and pulls far less galaxy structure into the stars layer. The failure modes are asymmetric: net's worst case is cosmetic, inpaint's destroys signal.
